character.name: instead of a blue li
character.prompt: A weathered female archaeologist in a sleeveless torn expedition shirt and dark trousers, standing in a wide, balanced stance. She carries a reinforced grave shovel, with a compact relic pistol holstered at her hip. Adorned with leather belts holding bone charms, rusted iron chisels, and glowing teal relic fragments. Deep maroon cloth wraps, worn boots, and salt-stained textures, capturing a gritty, gothic silhouette.
